OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential risks and take proactive steps to protect oneself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious when sharing personal information online, as it can easily fall into the wrong hands. 2) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of information before sharing it. 3) Use privacy settings on social media platforms to control who can see your content and personal information. 4) Be wary of sensational or unverifiable news, and fact-check it before sharing it. 5) Use trusted sources for news and information, such as reputable newspapers and websites. By following these tips, individuals can help protect themselves from the harmful effects of fake content on social media."

By following these tips, individuals can help protect themselves from the harmful effects of fake content on social media.
